title: T-027 — DSL rule disposition_bridge_v1 registered (P2 standby)
prompt:
# T-027 — DSL rule disposition_bridge_v1 registered (P2 standby)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §10.3, §15.4 V-SCHED-10, Appendix B feature flag
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Register disposition_bridge_v1 rule per §10.3 pseudo-DSL with phase=p2, triggers (wo.completed where item_type='intermediate'), decision tree, and feature flag planning.disposition_bridge.enabled=false (P2 standby).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0082_rule_disposition_bridge_v1.sql` upserting rule_registry row with type='decision', phase='p2', triggers JSONB, decision_tree JSONB.
2. Feature flag planning.disposition_bridge.enabled=false (P2 default).
3. Decision tree mirrors §10.3 logic (to_stock | direct_continue | planner_decides timeout 2h).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0082_rule_disposition_bridge_v1.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/rule-disposition-bridge.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0082 applied, when SELECT FROM rule_registry WHERE rule_id='disposition_bridge_v1' runs, then row exists with type='decision' and phase='p2'
2. Given migration 0082 applied, when SELECT decision_tree from that row, then it includes branches for to_stock, direct_continue, planner_decides (3 cases)
3. Given migration 0082 applied, when SELECT FROM feature_flags WHERE key='planning.disposition_bridge.enabled', then value=false

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/rule-disposition-bridge.test.ts asserting rule + decision_tree branches + flag
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test rule-disposition-bridge'

## Risk red lines
- Do not enable in P1 (P2 only — flag must default false)
- Do not implement event handler here (T-065/T-066)
- Do not omit any of the 3 decision branches

pipeline_inputs.description: Register disposition_bridge_v1 P2 rule + feature flag default false.
pipeline_inputs.details: Idempotent UPSERT registers rule with 3-branch decision_tree. Flag default false (P2 not active).
